top_signals.title: Treasuries Slip Before Payrolls as Traders Weigh Warsh Comments
top_signals.summary: Treasuries edged lower as traders awaited a US employment print that may give clues on the Federal Reserve’s interest-rate path after Chairman Kevin Warsh struck a dovish tone on inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia offers start-up customers chance to swap compute power for revenue share
top_signals.summary: Nvidia says it will give start-ups the chance to swap access to compute power for a slice of future profits under a new program aimed at AI-focused firms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Shares of BYD and Xiaomi surge as June delivery figures fuel optimism
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong-listed shares of Chinese electric vehicle makers surged, after companies posted June vehicle data that helped to buoy investor sentiment.
